channel.title: Shiite-Sunni Split on My Stream of Thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in Shiite-Sunni Split on My Stream of Thoughts

item.title: Shiite Phenomenon In Iran
item.description: I was doing my own research on the topic of the Shiite-Sunni split. Historically the idea of Shiite was entirely the Iraqi phenomenon. But how come it became Iranian phenomenon when Iran was kind of the backbone of Sunni Islam. Some of the greatest theologian e.g. Imam Al Gazzali, Imam Bukhari, Imam Muslim, Imam Al-Tirmidhi are Iranian? Even, Sibawayh, who is considered to be the founder of Arabic Grammer, was Persian.
